untranslatable_reason: Diamond Top pattern requires visual/structural identification (trend line drawing, minor highs/lows mapping, diamond shape geometry) which cannot be expressed with available indicators. Pattern recognition requires multi-bar shape analysis and trend line construction not supported by the indicator set. Volume trend linear regression direction is also not directly available. Success rates and target price computation marked AUTHOR_SILENT.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex geometric pattern (diamond formation) that requires visual chart analysis and trend line drawing. The provided entry/exit conditions use price action direction and volume as proxies, but this is a significant simplification. The bearish variant (69% success rate with 17% avg decline) suggests short entries on breakout, while bullish variant uses long entries. Without explicit target price rules (AUTHOR_SILENT), exit uses SMA crossover as a reasonable reversal condition. Recommend manual pattern identification with this rule as a confirmation filter only.
